sous_titres.text: I'm Mal, daughter of Maleficent, and this is my home.
I was born on the Isle of the Lost,
where all the villains had been banished,
That is, until Prince Ben decided that their children
So four villain kids-- the VKs-came to Auradon,
Long story short, Ben's the king now.
and we are about to head back to the Isle
to pick what will hopefully be a long line of new VKs
who get to come to Auradon and find
Oh, my gosh. Oh, my gosh, look at this!
I want to be picked so bad, oh, my gosh. Oh!

Yes, pick me, Mal, pick me!
I can't believe this day has finally arrived!
I honestly wish we could take you all with us,
and someday very soon, maybe we can.
Yeah, we're gonna be back here so many times,
you're going to be so sick of us.
Can we get a drumroll, please?
First, I would like to begin
with the granddaughter of Lady Tremaine,
And no way we're splitting up the twins,
so get over here, Squirmy, come on!
And last, but certainly not least,
we all picked this girl because we all agreed
that she could use a little bit
Give it on up for Dr. Facilier's daughter, Celia!
We'll be back for you guys next week, okay?
Yeah, so pack your stuff, your own stuff.
- Where are you going?! - We're going to--
I think if Uma was up to something,
No, Ben, I know how villains think,
and I don't trust Uma as far as I can throw her.
She's gonna wait until our defenses are down
and then that's when she's gonna strike.
I really wish I had time to go do a dragon flyover,
because I can go much higher.
Well, you can't be everywhere at once.
Come on, everyone's waiting for us.
I'm getting more guards. Now, breathe.
Thank you, thank you so much
for coming out to welcome our new arrivals.
Not like we had a choice.
It worked out pretty well for the first four.
Mal, this is the exact spot we first met
I feel like I've known you my whole life.
But did I mention I'm in love with you?
♪ I met this girl who rocked my world ♪
♪ And now I'm living just for her ♪
♪ I never thought that it could happen ♪
♪ But now look at what you've done, you've got me ♪
- I am so sorry. - It's okay.
Makes our movie night seem a little tame.
Audrey, you were supposed to be his queen,
and you let him slip through your fingers.
Your mother could hold on to a prince in her sleep.
Don't you think I feel bad enough already, Grammy?
Ben and Mal are the best!
I'm so excited for Mal to be our queen.
You'd really rather have a VK on the throne than me?
What is wrong with you people?
You are gonna rock that crown.
Okay, so I've only done about a thousand sketches
of your wedding dress, and... Belle's already planned
It's a really good thing I said yes.
- I love you, Belle. - Oh, I love you.
Thank you so much, Fairy Godmother.
All bow to Her Royal Majesty!
- As you wish, my liege! - Your Crankiness.
You won him fair and square.
You spelled Ben to destroy all of Auradon.
Speaking of kids, we have some kids waiting on us,
Alright, boys. Let's hit the road.
You're gonna see him soon, okay? Come on.
- Do you have everything? - Yes, I have everything.
- Are you sure? - I'm sure, Granny.
I don't know what you're going to do without me.
Here, let me get this off you.
So, as soon as we get to Auradon,
- you have to try ice cream. - And go swimming?!
I can take you to the Enchanted Lake.
I can't believe I get to live with you
It's just a little starter castle.
You're going to be a wise and brave king.
The only reason they should be opening that barrier
is for putting Uma back in,
Stop the car, he's trying to escape!
- Okay, nobody needs to panic. - It's Mal!
There's your precious queen, she can't even protect us!
He was draining all of my magic with the ember
and I felt... all of my power slipping away.
You're safe. He's back where he belongs.
Your mother could hold on to a prince

I think we all know why we're here.
The people are in a panic about Hades.
Who knows what he would've done if he had escaped.
We can't risk having another villain on the loose.
I really feel like this is my fault.
You did. You do protect Auradon.
Every time we open the barrier,
Maleficent's scepter and the queen's crown
- Uma. - We don't know that, Dad.
they will never wanna leave their houses.
How do we keep evil out of Auradon?
one way to guarantee their safety.
can't be any more going in and out.
I think that we have to close the barrier... forever.
I do not want to take away your dream,
and it is why I fell in love with you.
But as king and as queen, what's our duty?
But you know what this would mean?
And, no, I'm not prepared for it.
I just think that we have no other choice.
I just don't think that we would forgive ourselves
Who else knows about the crown and the scepter?
No one. I mean, think about it,
people are scared enough as it is.
We have to employ these entirely new security measures.
Will this delay our bringing over more VKs?
We're talking about closing the barrier for good.
I mean, the four of us are living the dream here,
and we finally get to share that.
I mean, what could be more important than that?
Or maybe peace of mind for everyone in Auradon.
M, were they seriously thinking that no one will ever
go in and out of the Isle ever again?
What, we never get to go back and see our parents?
We promised them that they could go back and visit
M, I'm so glad that you are going to be queen.
You'll be a part of these conversations,
you will stand up for the VKs.
And you'll be a great queen.
Wooh. Morning. Got the beach towels.
These. I really think she's gonna like the cake, you guys.
Okay, who got into Jane's cake?!
I especially love the lack of dirt.
I was hoping you were home.
What are you doing with the crown and the scepter?
Well, I wanted them, so I took them.
You of all people should understand that, Mal.
Wait! Audrey, stop! Don't use that.
It's not a toy, it's dangerous!
My life was perfect until you stole it.
And then Auradon turned its back on me.
It's time for a little payback.
You think Ben will love you now, you old hag?
You'll pay the price for what you did,
Uh, you might wanna think of a spell for that.
There's no spell that can reverse
Audrey's out for revenge, and all of Auradon is in danger.
The only thing more powerful than the scepter...
Oh, like he's just gonna hand it over
if you blew him back to the Isle.
No one knows where his lair is.
I do, I'm his errand rat. I've got the key at my dad's.
- You're coming. - But I just got here.
Dizzy, stay here to take care of the twins,
we'll be right back and everything will be just fine.
Now, let's just get you into something fabulous.
- Oh, yeah. There we go. - Okay.
Carlos! You're gonna miss Jane's birthday!
Looks like Carlos forgot your birthday, huh?
Well, maybe not, maybe he just took
They probably don't celebrate birthdays on the Isle,
maybe it's like a cultural thing.
Or maybe he just forgot. You never know.
Hey, Chad, look! There's people taking selfies.
Selfies! Guys! Wait, wait, wait, wait!
Wait for me! Wait for me!
Looks like someone forgot to invite me.
Well, don't be expecting Mal, she's, uh...
Aw, does it just ruin everything?
How could you forget what she did to us?
How could you forget that I was supposed to be your queen?!
First off, great new look. I absolutely love the feathers.
But before you do whatever you're gonna do,
I was wondering if maybe you wanted a, uh,
royal boyfriend by your side. Huh?
Or maybe just a lackey to, uh, do your bidding.
If Auradon likes to forget so much,
I'm on my way to the party, the meetings ran long.
No, no, stay where you are, Ben.
Audrey stole the scepter, and everyone's asleep.
I'm gonna call Mom and tell her to get her wand.
Duh! Evil magic doesn't work here.
So, what kind of hustle you got going on
No hustle. I got friends on the other side.
Ah, I hear you, I hear you.
I'm kind of a major player, so...
that's why I can't stay long.
You make sure you get your cut.
Alerts of the sleeping spell keep coming in as it spreads
Uh, guys? Come look at this.
There are rumors that Sleeping Beauty's daughter,
We're trying to discover who is responsible
and which villain has perpetrated this evil.
We have an update. It's what?
Catch me if you can, Jay!
- Over the roofs! Cut 'em off. - Yeah.
Hey, hey, hey, not you. They got this.
You and me gotta go find the ember.
Good timing, it's right about his nap time.
Okay, stay quiet, it echoes like crazy in here.
I noticed you were low on canned corn.
Quite a show you put on the other day.
I was just coming to see you.
Is it because I'm gonna be queen?
You abandoned me when I was a baby.
No. No, I left your mother.
she's not the easiest person to get along with.
We have something in common already.
No. I don't hate my mother.
She may be an evil lunatic, but at least she stuck around.
Wake up and smell the stink.
You think you've had it rough?
I used to be a god!
I had an entire world which bore my name,
You have no idea what that feels like.
Because for 16 years, I had nothing!
And now, I have a whole world.
But unless I get that ember, it's game over.

The ember only works for me.
No, it'll work for me. We're blood.

If it gets wet, it's game over.
I guess that's the reason why he's always asking about you.
Evie is the only one who knows that he's my dad.
And as far as I'm concerned, he doesn't even exist.
No, no, I want the Auradon guard handing out gas masks.
Find out if anyone's seen Audrey.
And find if she has a list of demands.
I'll wake everybody up right now.
Make me your queen and we'll rule side by side.
Did someone put a spell on you?
- You just tell me who, and I'll-- - You'll what? Marry them?
Most people get dumped because they aren't good enough.
How do you like me now, Benny Boo?
I like the old Audrey better.
Just... give me the scepter and I'll forgive you.
Sleeping is too good for you!
Sleeping is too good for Auradon.
Alright. Get in, get out. Jay, you good?
Whoa, you got a little Hades' thing going.
- Wow. - That thing packs a punch, huh?
- We made it, bro. - We made it.
Hey, guys, we just come for a... wee visit.
It can't get wet! Give it back before it goes out!
Uma. You swam off and forgot all about us.
Yeah, planning her revenge, no doubt.
It's not all about you, Mal.
I was looking for a hole in the barrier,
And you know what I found, boys?
It's way better out there than we thought.
There's this thing that looks like a furry rock
And fish so big you could dance on their backs.
And they've been keeping it all for themselves.
Whatever. Uma, I need that to break a spell.
Cast by Audrey, Sleeping Beauty's daughter.
Hmm, so the good guy's the bad guy?
Well, I might not give it back.
Uma, it's not the time for games!
Guarantee me that every single villain kid who wants to
Because if I think I trust you to save the world on your own,
This is a job for pirates!
We can always go back to hating each other
- Look at his face. - Here's a thought.
We could try to be friends.
Put our history behind us and celebrate our differences.
Ah! No. I'm in charge. Let's go.
I can't get Ben. Or Dizzy or Doug.
Yeah, and when everybody wakes up, you're gonna love it.
You have leaves on your trees!
And what are those color things in the bushes?
We don't have any fresh fruit on the Isle, remember?
I believe I deserve some compensation
and my role in this endeavor.
Me not squashing you like a bug.
Like I'm scared of you, Jay.
What?! It wasn't me, I swear! Okay, it was me.
Oh, do you know what happened here?
Yep, Audrey showed up, she put everybody to sleep,
and then she turned some of them to--
Alright, everybody stay on their toes.
Look, since we're here, let's check the school.
No. Audrey went straight for the crown,
so I think it's safe to assume she's gonna go
for Ben and his castle next.
Says you. That's supposed to mean something to me?
- How did Mal break my spell?! - I don't know.
And what is Uma doing here?!
- Where did they go? - I don't know!
- I can go check for you-- - Stay!
It's about to get a little ugly.
Ugh. Ben could be asleep anywhere.
I got a scent, very pungent cologne,
FYI, I give great cuddles, too.
Really? I never had a pet growing up.
Except for the elk head in dad's man cave,
- but that's not really-- - Hold up.
Any chance this was already there?
So you can track, cuddle, and talk.
Hey, do you think his puppies will be able to talk, too?
You want a dog? Adopt a rescue.
I bet you lost some sleep
thinking about me on the loose, huh?
No. Dragons don't really lose sleep.
I wondered what fried octopus tastes like.
Let's split up and look for Audrey.
unless you give me my ember, she's gonna spell you.
How about a knight in shining armor?

we need to get out of here ASAP.

You're right, because of summer school.

Sounds like we're going with my plan. I'm just saying.

bounce around and jump off things.

you're probably used to grabbing lunch

but, I'd love to see one of those.

she should be able to wake him up.

I said "Details to follow," we're meeting up

but it's been a really crazy day.
